userStories.title: Map non-AEAT official source coverage and fail-closed gaps
acceptanceCriteria: List BOE, BORME, CNMV, EUR-Lex, FATCA/GIIN, CRS, ESMA/MiCA, PSD2/SEPA, screening and doctrine-source domains.
Record production row counts, latest worker/job state and API/MCP exposure status.
Classify each domain as covered, partial, workflow_empty, allowed_empty or configured_but_unavailable.
Write evidence to docs/source-domain-audit.md.
userStories.verificationCommand: test -f docs/source-domain-audit.md && grep -q 'Non-AEAT Source Domain Audit' docs/source-domain-audit.md && grep -q 'GIIN' docs/source-domain-audit.md && echo PASS

userStories.title: Expose BORME and key non-AEAT sources through API/MCP safely
acceptanceCriteria: Mount BORME router in FastAPI.
Add BORME schemas so OpenAPI import succeeds.
Expose read-only source tools through HTTP MCP catalog.
Keep unavailable domains fail-closed through existing availability contract.

userStories.title: Bound source list endpoints before MCP exposure
acceptanceCriteria: Add limit/offset pagination to /v1/irs-fiscal/giin.
Add limit/offset pagination to BORME, EUR-Lex, PSD2 ASPSP/AISP/PISP and SEPA list endpoints exposed through MCP.
Expose pagination metadata in response models where response_model is enforced.
Test bounded GIIN, EUR-Lex, PSD2 and SEPA responses.

userStories.title: Deploy source-domain MCP coverage and rerun production gates
acceptanceCriteria: Deploy commit to VPS.
Verify /v1/borme returns 200.
Verify /v1/irs-fiscal/giin?limit=3 returns exactly three rows and pagination metadata.
Verify MCP tools/list includes non-AEAT source tools.
Run mcp_validation_suite and mcp_deep_contract_audit on VPS.
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose --env-file /etc/esdata/esdata.env -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm --no-deps -v /srv/esdata:/workspace -w /workspace api sh -lc 'python scripts/maintenance/mcp_validation_suite.py --read-only --base-url http://api:8000 && python scripts/maintenance/mcp_deep_contract_audit.py --base-url http://api:8000'

userStories.title: Populate FATCA/CRS international obligations with official provenance
acceptanceCriteria: official-regulatory-references loads FATCA, CRS, DAC2 and DAC6 reference rows into obligacion_internacional from official BOE/EUR-Lex sources.
/v1/internacional/obligaciones returns bounded paginated responses.
Detail responses expose source_url/source_worker/source_fetched_at from source_revision.
VPS run writes a fresh sync_log row and leaves stale_workers=0.
mcp_validation_suite remains ok=true after deployment.
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose --env-file /etc/esdata/esdata.env -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm official-regulatory-references --run-once && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/internacional/obligaciones?limit=3 | jq '.total' && docker compose --env-file /etc/esdata/esdata.env -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm --no-deps -v /srv/esdata:/workspace -w /workspace api sh -lc 'python scripts/maintenance/mcp_validation_suite.py --read-only --base-url http://api:8000'

userStories.title: Review external MCP code and expose EUR-Lex limited evidence explicitly
acceptanceCriteria: Review EU_compliance_MCP and boe-mcp code for reusable official-source ingestion patterns.
Document which patterns are safe to adopt and which are rejected as interpretive or non-official.
Expose EUR-Lex metadata-only records as explicit evidence_limited rather than silent empty text.
Test /v1/eurlex detail and list responses include coverage_status, verified, completeness, articulos_total and evidence_notice.

userStories.title: Implement EUR-Lex deep article ingestion safe mode
acceptanceCriteria: Use Publications Office consolidation/RDF flow as primary source for article text.
Add run budget controls so EURLEX_FETCH_ARTICLES cannot hang a cron run silently.
If browser fallback is added, keep it opt-in, CELEX allowlisted and validated against WAF challenge pages.
Persist article counts and quality status so API can distinguish metadata_only, partial and article_text_available.
Run one bounded VPS ingestion and confirm sync_log row plus articulo/version_articulo growth.
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/eurlex?limit=5 | jq '[.documentos[] | {referencia, coverage_status, verified, completeness, articulos_total}]'

userStories.title: Assess BOE non-consolidated XML/PDF fallback
acceptanceCriteria: Map BOE diario XML and PDF fallback needs for BOE-B/BOE-S/BOE-N and BORME-like documents.
Do not mix non-consolidated PDF extraction with BOE consolidated law rows.
Document target tables, provenance fields and quality labels before implementation.
userStories.verificationCommand: test -f docs/reference-mcp-code-review.md && grep -q 'BOE non-consolidated fallback' docs/reference-mcp-code-review.md && echo PASS

userStories.title: Add MCP outputSchema and read-only annotations
acceptanceCriteria: HTTP MCP tools/list exposes outputSchema for every exposed tool.
HTTP MCP tools/list exposes readOnlyHint=true and destructiveHint=false for every read-only ESData tool.
Stdio tool definitions receive the same contract metadata.
A focused MCP tools/list test verifies the contract.
